score.label: Reliable and Productive
score.justification: The supervisor describes strong task execution...

evidence.quote: He helps me with production tracking. Every evening he updates it and sends it to me on WhatsApp.
evidence.interpretation: Reliable daily task completion, but the tracking sheet is maintained by the Fellow personally — not a self-sustaining system.

evidence.quote: He doesn't really push back. If I tell him to do something, he does it.
evidence.interpretation: Supervisor explicitly flags lack of independent initiative — a ceiling on scoring above 6.

kpiMapping.evidence: Handles quality complaints from Tier 1 customers
Cycle time study for drum brake line saved 10 min per batch

gaps.detail: Transcript mentions one system (production tracking sheet) but it's personally maintained by the Fellow. No evidence of systems that run without the Fellow.
No mention of how the Fellow handles resistance or gets the floor team to adopt new processes.

followUpQuestions.question: If Karthik took a week off, what would stop working? What would keep running on its own?
followUpQuestions.lookingFor: Whether any of Karthik's work is self-sustaining or everything depends on his personal presence.

followUpQuestions.question: Has Karthik ever come to you with a problem you hadn't noticed, and a suggestion for how to fix it?
followUpQuestions.lookingFor: Evidence of Level 7 behavior — independent problem identification beyond assigned tasks.

followUpQuestions.question: How do the floor workers respond when Karthik asks them to do something differently?
followUpQuestions.lookingFor: Whether the Fellow can get experienced workers to adopt new processes.
